title: Servlet Request-Response Cycle with Tomcat
description: A flowchart illustrating the lifecycle of an HTTP request as it is processed by the Apache Tomcat server and a Java Servlet, resulting in a dynamic response.
relationships: Client sends HTTP Request to Tomcat
Tomcat's Servlet Container receives the request and determines the target Servlet
Servlet Container calls servlet's service() method (which routes to doGet()/doPost())
Servlet executes business logic, potentially interacting with a Database
Servlet generates a dynamic response (HTML/JSON) and sends it back to the Container
Tomcat sends the HTTP Response back to the Client Browser
